meta.tagline: Websites That Work As Hard As You Do
meta.subtitle: Professional web design & hosting for small businesses, freelancers, and entrepreneurs.
meta.aboutText: Hi, I'm Skye Neilz — the designer, developer, and host behind Neilz Network. I build clean, fast, and conversion-focused websites that help real businesses grow online. No bloated templates, no confusing tech — just sharp sites that make your brand look like it means business. Whether you need a brand-new site or a reliable home for an existing one, I handle everything so you can focus on running your business.

services.name: Website Design & Build
services.description: A fully custom website built from scratch — no page builders, no bloat. Designed to load fast, look sharp, and convert visitors into customers.
features: Custom design tailored to your brand

services.name: Build + Hosting Bundle
services.description: Everything in the Design & Build package, plus managed hosting through Neilz Network. One point of contact for your entire web presence.

services.name: Hosting Only
services.description: Already have a site? Move it to Neilz Network hosting for reliable uptime, fast speeds, and a developer you can actually reach.

processSteps.title: Discovery Call
processSteps.description: We start with a quick chat about your business, your goals, and what kind of site you need. No hard sell — just a real conversation.

processSteps.title: Design & Build
processSteps.description: I design and develop your site, keeping you updated along the way. You'll see the work before it goes live.

processSteps.title: Review & Revise
processSteps.description: You get a full preview of the finished site. We'll fine-tune anything that needs adjusting until you're happy with every detail.

processSteps.title: Launch
processSteps.description: We push your site live and you're open for business. If you're on a hosting plan, I handle everything behind the scenes.
